title: Negotiating Prices
description: Language for haggling and price negotiation: soft openers, counter-offers, polite pushback.
summary_pt_br: Frases de negociação: 'Is that the best price?', 'Would you consider...?', 'A bit above my budget'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Language for haggling and price negotiation: soft openers, counter-offers, polite pushback.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Frases de negociação: 'Is that the best price?', 'Would you consider...?', 'A bit above my budget'.

scenes.text_en: Language for haggling and price negotiation: soft openers, counter-offers, polite pushback. Today's focus: negotiating prices. Is this the best price you can offer me?
scenes.text_pt: Frases de negociação: 'Is that the best price?', 'Would you consider...?', 'A bit above my budget'. Foco de hoje: negotiating prices. Esse é o melhor preço que você me faz?

scenes.title: Negotiating Prices
scenes.body_en: Key phrases: 'Is this the best you can do?', 'Would you consider X?', 'That's a bit above my budget.', 'What if we agreed on Y?'. Soft modals (could, would, might) smooth negotiations.
scenes.body_pt: Frases de negociação: 'Is that the best price?', 'Would you consider...?', 'A bit above my budget'.

examples.en: Is this the best price you can offer me?
examples.pt: Esse é o melhor preço que você me faz?

examples.en: Would you consider a small discount for cash?
That is a bit above my budget, honestly.
examples.pt: Sinceramente, está um pouco acima do meu orçamento.

exercise.question: Complete: "Is this the best ___ you can offer me?"
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Is this the best price you can offer me?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Esse é o melhor preço que você me faz?

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Would you consider a small discount for cash?
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Would you consider a small discount for cash?"
Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Negotiating Prices — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre negotiating prices. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I'm interested in the big fridge. How much is it?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It's two thousand dollars, with a one-year warranty.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is this the best price you can offer?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: If you pay in cash, I can go down to eighteen hundred.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is still a bit above my budget.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What did you have in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Would you consider fifteen hundred with delivery?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I can do sixteen hundred, and delivery is included.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We have a deal. Thank you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Pleasure doing business. I'll deliver tomorrow morning.

scenes.title: A deal at the appliance store
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe how the negotiation went step by step. Use at least three negotiation phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At a small appliance store, a calm negotiation unfolded over a used commercial fridge.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Is this the best price you can offer me today?

paragraphs.speaker: Seller
paragraphs.en: In cash, I can go down to eighteen hundred with a one-year warranty.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: That is still a bit above my budget for the new food truck.

paragraphs.speaker: Seller
paragraphs.en: Would you consider sixteen hundred including home delivery?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Two respectful counter-offers later, both parties walked away feeling they had won.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Negotiating Prices". Language for haggling and price negotiation: soft openers, counter-offers, polite pushback. Is this the best price you can offer me? Would you consider a small discount for cash? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Negotiating Prices". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
